text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Bright? It's not like you to eat lunch this late.
Could you wait a few minutes? I'm afraid we can
only whip up some ramen at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'd love a serving of that, please. Nothing hits the
spot like a savory bowl of ramen after a solo
training session. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: How strange... No matter how much I eat, my bowl isn't getting any emptier... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Your noodles have gone soggy, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eating all of the soup-heavy noodles proves too
much for Bright, who ends up getting a
stomachache...
